mapper.select: SELECT o.*, s.consignor, s.short_name, schedule.actual_name scheduleName, oe.enterprise_name, tr.transport_route_name FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON s.shipper_id = o.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_employee schedule ON schedule.employee_id = o.schedule_id LEFT JOIN t_oa_enterprise oe ON oe.enterprise_id = o.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN t_transport_route tr on tr.transport_route_id = o.transport_route_id WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND o.deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}

SELECT o.*, s.consignor, s.short_name, schedule.actual_name scheduleName, oe.enterprise_name FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON s.shipper_id = o.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_employee schedule ON schedule.employee_id = o.schedule_id LEFT JOIN t_oa_enterprise oe ON oe.enterprise_id = o.enterprise_id where o.order_id in
#{item}
select order_id from t_order where order_no = #{orderNo}
select count(1) from t_order where status != #{excludeStatus} and enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
